'''Hideaz Quill-Face''' was a three-[[Meter/Legends|meter]]-tall [[Smuggler/Legends|smuggler]] of an [[Alien/Legends|alien]] [[Species/Legends|species]]. He was often seen at the [[Byss Bistro]] with his partner, [[Spog]].

{{Char-stub}}

*[[Dark Empire 5|''Dark Empire'' 5]] {{1st}}
